info.title:
Discover
Villa Los Reyes
info.description: Welcome to Villa Los Reyes in Viñales. With over 20 years of experience, we offer hotel and extra-hotel services tailored to your needs. We are dedicated to ensuring your maximum comfort, guaranteeing you enjoy an eco-friendly resort with 24-hour electricity. Come and enjoy a unique experience in an incomparable setting.

mainHeader.title: Discover Villa Los Reyes
mainHeader.description: Explore our guesthouse with over 20 years of experience

location.title: Privileged Location
location.description: Located in a privileged environment, Villa Los Reyes is in the picturesque town of Viñales, offering easy and quick access to all local attractions while enjoying the tranquility and natural beauty of the region.

nature.title: Natural Beauty
nature.description: At Villa Los Reyes, in addition to finding a place to rest, you can enjoy a variety of experiences and adventures. We offer eco-activities guided by local experts, allowing you to explore the natural and cultural beauty of Viñales, from walking, horseback riding, car and bicycle tours to visits to tobacco plantations and caves.

comfort.title: Comfort
comfort.description: Villa Los Reyes is a private eco-friendly resort with modern construction, equipped with solar panels to ensure 24-hour electricity. It offers five comfortable rooms, a restaurant with local and international dishes, and a bar with exquisite Cuban cocktails. There is also a perfect pool for hot days and wheelchair accessibility. From its terraces, enjoy a majestic view of the mogotes, completing a unique experience of comfort and nature.

sustainability.title: Sustainability
sustainability.description: We are proud to say our villa is sustainable, as the electricity we use is managed via solar panels, contributing to environmental care. Additionally, we have implemented recycling and water-efficient practices, ensuring every aspect of our operation minimizes ecological impact and promotes a greener, healthier future.

aboutSection.mainAlt: Overall view of Villa Los Reyes

header.title: Experiences and Adventures

Discover Viñales with our exciting tours: [horseback riding](/experiences/horseback-riding), [hiking](/experiences/hiking), [cycle tours](/experiences/cycle-tours) and [more](/experiences/other).
Unforgettable adventures in a unique natural setting await you!

packageOne.subtitle: Special Offer Packages

packageTwo.subtitle: Special Offer Packages
packageTwo.description: A package designed for those seeking a balance between countryside tranquility and the beauty of nearby beaches. Perfect for families or groups looking to combine relaxation and fun.

packageThree.title: Romance in Viñales
packageThree.subtitle: Special Offer Packages
packageThree.description: Let yourself be enchanted by the magic of Viñales with a romantic getaway among spectacular landscapes, intimate dinners, and unforgettable moments of relaxation.

packageFour.title: Nature & Tradition
packageFour.subtitle: Special Offer Packages
packageFour.description: Enjoy a unique experience in Viñales, where nature and tradition come together in unforgettable moments of romance, adventure, and relaxation.

headerExperience.title: Experiences and Adventures
headerExperience.description: Discover unforgettable adventures and unique experiences in Viñales.

galleryHorseRiding.title: Riding to the mountains
galleryHorseRiding.description: Discover Los Acuáticos, a mountain community in Viñales known for its belief in the healing properties of water. Immerse yourself in their traditions, connect with the residents and enjoy their hospitality while admiring the impressive views of the Viñales and Palmarito Valleys. A unique experience that combines nature, culture and tradition.

galleryFascinatingLandscape.title: A fascinating landscape
galleryFascinatingLandscape.description: Explore the Palmarito Valley, an impressive landscape where the contrast between red soils and lush vegetation reflects the essence of rural Cuba. Enjoy panoramic views, learn about farmers' traditions and discover the process of tobacco cultivation directly from local farmers.

gallerySunsetRide.title: The setting sun
gallerySunsetRide.description: A horseback ride through Viñales allows you to explore mountains and valleys surrounded by vibrant nature. Along the way, local farmers share their work in the tobacco fields, while you enjoy a criollo cigar and a Saoco Viñalero at sunset in the Valle del Silencio. The day ends with a refreshing swim in a nearby lake, watching the sunset.

galleryPenitenceValley.title: Penitence Valley
galleryPenitenceValley.description: Explore the Penitence Valley, a small yet impressive destination featuring agricultural landscapes and remarkable natural beauty. During this excursion, you will enjoy its agricultural richness and visit the Mural of Prehistory, one of the largest open-air fresco paintings, depicting the geological evolution of Viñales.

galleryVinalesValley.title: The most famous
galleryVinalesValley.description: Discover the stunning Viñales Valley, a world-renowned destination for its size, beauty and cultural richness. On a tour of approximately two hours, you will admire its unique landscapes and immerse yourself in the authentic rural life, interacting with local residents and learning about their traditions. An enriching experience combining nature, history and the cultural essence of Viñales.

header.title: Services and Facilities
header.description: Discover the services that will make your stay an unforgettable experience

sections.title: Discover our facilities
sections.description: We offer a unique experience with our independent rooms, providing privacy and comfort. Enjoy panoramic views from our terraces, perfect for relaxing. Stroll through our lush gardens and immerse yourself in the tranquility of nature. Additionally, we have a refreshing pool for your enjoyment. Come and experience an unforgettable stay.

sections.title: Discover our services
sections.description: Enjoy delicious Cuban cuisine prepared by local chefs, transportation to explore the region, and assistance from our travel manager to make the most of your stay. Additionally, we provide laundry service, relaxing massages to recharge your energy, and dance classes to immerse yourself in Cuban culture.

header.title: Our Services
header.description: Discover services that will make your stay an unforgettable experience.

sections.title: Gastronomy
sections.description: In our restaurant and bar, enjoy authentic Cuban food alongside vegetarian, Italian, and Mediterranean options. We offer meals from breakfast to dinner, with snacks and takeaways if you are on the move. Don't miss our Cuban cocktails, each drink reflecting the authentic taste of Cuba. Come and savor the best of our cuisine!

head.title: Our Rooms
head.description: Discover services that will make your stay an unforgettable experience.

roomsInfo.title: Room 1
roomsInfo.description: Enjoy a comfortable stay and a relaxing atmosphere in our spacious room, ideal for couples, families, or groups. Equipped with comfortable beds, air conditioning, a private bathroom, and warm décor with colonial touches, this room offers the perfect balance between comfort and Cuban authenticity.

head.title: Our Rooms
head.description: Discover services that will make your stay an unforgettable experience.

roomsInfo.title: Room 2
roomsInfo.description: Discover our spacious and bright room, ideal for families or groups. With three comfortable beds, this room provides the perfect environment to relax. Enjoy the natural light coming through the large sliding window and the beautiful garden view outside.

head.title: Our Rooms
head.description: Discover services that will make your stay an unforgettable experience.

roomsInfo.title: Room 3
roomsInfo.description: Room ideal for relaxing after a day of exploration. This room provides the essentials for a comfortable stay. Enjoy the natural light that brightens the space and the tranquility it offers.

head.title: Our Rooms
head.description: Discover services that will make your stay an unforgettable experience.

roomsInfo.title: Room 4
roomsInfo.description: Relax in this cozy room in Viñales, ideal for your stay. With two comfortable single beds and décor in warm tones, this space offers everything you need for a pleasant stay.

head.title: Our Rooms
head.description: Discover services that will make your stay an unforgettable experience.

roomsInfo.title: Room 5 — Suite
roomsInfo.description: Immerse yourself in a unique suite, designed to offer the perfect balance between comfort and style. Designed for couples, its warm atmosphere and elegant décor create the ideal environment for rest. The natural light that fills the space enhances its warmth, inviting you to relax after a day of exploring Viñales.

header.title: Experiences & Adventures
header.description: Discover unforgettable adventures and unique experiences in Viñales.

gallerySections.leftImageAlt: Facilities and panoramic views of Villa Los Reyes
gallerySections.infoTitle: Horseback Riding in Viñales: nature, culture, and tradition in every step
gallerySections.infoDescription: Exploring Viñales on horseback is an immersive experience that reveals the essence of the Cuban landscape. Among towering mogotes and lush tobacco fields, the journey leads to traditional farms where tobacco and coffee are cultivated by hand. Accessible to all experience levels, this activity promotes sustainable tourism, strengthening the connection with local communities and protecting the natural environment.

gallerySections.leftImageAlt: Facilities and panoramic views of Villa Los Reyes
gallerySections.infoTitle: Hiking in Viñales: between mountains, valleys, and living traditions
gallerySections.infoDescription: Walking through the trails of Viñales means discovering a vibrant environment where biodiversity, fresh air, and mountain landscapes set the pace of the journey. The routes pass through fertile valleys and natural viewpoints, while interactions with local farmers reveal agricultural traditions passed down through generations. An enriching experience that blends adventure, culture, and respect for nature.

gallerySections.leftImageAlt: Facilities and panoramic views of Villa Los Reyes
gallerySections.infoTitle: Viñales on wheels: a journey through nature and tradition
gallerySections.infoDescription: Exploring Viñales by bike is a dynamic and authentic way to connect with its iconic landscapes. The paths wind between mogotes, tobacco farms, and lively rural scenery, offering complete immersion in the environment. Encounters with local farmers and their traditional knowledge add cultural value to this active experience, where movement becomes a way of discovering.

gallerySections.leftImageAlt: Facilities and panoramic views of Villa Los Reyes
gallerySections.infoTitle: Beyond the valley: unique experiences in Viñales
gallerySections.infoDescription: Viñales surprises with a diverse range of experiences that go far beyond its mountain landscapes. Just a few kilometers away, Cayo Jutías invites you to relax among turquoise waters and white sands, perfect for swimming, snorkeling, or simply unwinding. On land, agro-ecological farms welcome visitors with sustainable practices and authentic flavors. A destination that blends nature, local culture, and moments of true serenity.

aventuraNatural.title: Natural Adventure
aventuraNatural.description: Immerse yourself in unique landscapes, explore the mogotes, and enjoy outdoor activities that connect you with the rural essence of Cuba. Ideal for couples, small groups, or solo travelers.
itinerary: Welcome cocktail with refreshing natural juices or typical cocktails. Free afternoon to relax on the terrace with views of the mogotes. Dinner at a restaurant with traditional Cuban dishes.
Breakfast at the restaurant. Excursion to Cayo Jutías: "A paradisiacal beach". Return to the house and dinner at the restaurant.
Hiking: "Incredible sunrise". Breakfast at the restaurant. Experiences and adventures: "Great Cave of Santo Tomás". Dinner at the restaurant with a special menu.
Farewell breakfast at the restaurant with fresh local products. Departure to the next destination.
